title: SHARED-DISK-MIGRATION
scope: Closes the A8 carry-over Phase 57 opened: 28 hardcoded Storage::disk('local') callsites across 13 files in app/ pin the deployment to a single host's filesystem. The Phase-22 PERF-SCALE-1 watchdog catches new callsites but the existing 28 are accepted technical debt â€” until Phase 58 ships the abstraction that lets an operator flip to S3 (or any other Filesystem driver) without code changes. The cycle introduces a Storage::tenant() facade backed by config('filesystems.tenant_disk') + refactors every callsite + adds round-trip integration tests + drops the Phase-22 baseline from 28 to 0. The existing 'private' alias-disk (config/filesystems.php:49) was Phase-1's UPLOAD-5 fix â€” Phase 58 generalises that pattern across every callsite. No data migration is required: the path strings stored in Document.file_path / WaterReading.photo_path / Lease.lease_doc_path / Invoice.pdf_path stay the same; only the disk used to access them changes via the operator-controlled FILESYSTEM_TENANT_DISK env var. Six categories x 3 findings = 18.

categories.TENANT-DISK-RESOLVER: Introduce a single facade so every callsite reads from one place. (1) App\Services\Storage\TenantDiskResolver::resolve(?int $landlordId = null): \Illuminate\Contracts\Filesystem\Filesystem returns Storage::disk(config('filesystems.tenant_disk', 'local')). Today $landlordId is recorded for future per-tenant disk routing but not used (default disk maps to the same underlying storage for every tenant). (2) Storage::tenant() macro registered in AppServiceProvider::boot â€” syntactic sugar for app(TenantDiskResolver::class)->resolve(). (3) config/filesystems.php gains a 'tenant_disk' => env('FILESYSTEM_TENANT_DISK', 'local') knob at the top of the file (before the 'disks' array). Operator can flip to 's3' or 'archive' in production without code changes; default 'local' keeps dev/test green.
categories.CALLSITE-SVC: Refactor the 11 callsites in app/Services/* + app/Jobs/* to use Storage::tenant() instead of Storage::disk('local'). (1) app/Services/DataExportService.php (6 callsites â€” heavy: makeDirectory + put + path + delete + get + Storage::disk() bind). (2) app/Services/ImportService.php (2) + app/Services/InvoicePdfService.php (1) + app/Services/OcrService.php (2) + app/Services/Tickets/TicketAnnotationService.php (1) = 6 more callsites. (3) app/Jobs/GenerateInvoicePdf.php (1 callsite). Total 13 callsites in this batch.
categories.CALLSITE-MODEL: Refactor the 6 callsites in app/Models/* to use Storage::tenant(). (1) app/Models/Document.php (3 callsites â€” path/exists/delete). Refactor inside the model methods (filePath / existsOnDisk / deleteFile) â€” the model carries no $landlord_id reference at the file-op level so the resolver gets null today (forward-compatible). (2) app/Models/WaterReading.php (3 callsites â€” photoExistsOnDisk / hasPhotoOnDisk / deletePhoto). (3) Document the per-tenant-routing carve-out: models with implicit landlord context (Document::user_id, WaterReading::landlord_id) can pass the id to the resolver when future per-tenant disks land; for now they pass null and rely on the platform-wide tenant_disk config.
categories.CALLSITE-CTRL: Refactor the 9 callsites in app/Http/Controllers/* to use Storage::tenant(). (1) app/Http/Controllers/DocumentController.php (2 callsites â€” download + response) + app/Http/Controllers/WaterReadingController.php (1 callsite â€” response). (2) app/Http/Controllers/LeaseController.php (3 callsites â€” delete + exists + download) + app/Http/Controllers/TenantDocumentsController.php (1 callsite â€” download). (3) app/Http/Controllers/TenantKycController.php (2 callsites â€” exists + delete). Controllers naturally have $request->user()->landlord_id available; pass it to Storage::tenant($landlordId) so the resolver records the context even though today it doesn't route per-tenant.
categories.INTEGRATION-TESTS: Confidence in the migration depends on round-trip tests proving writes-then-reads still work through TenantDiskResolver. (1) Phase58TenantDiskRoundTripTest with 3 scenarios: write+read via Storage::tenant()->put + Storage::tenant()->get; assertContains absolute-path round-trip via Storage::tenant()->path(); delete + assertFalse exists. Use Storage::fake('local') in setUp. (2) Phase58CallsiteRefactorTest is a content-token watchdog: scan app/Services/DataExportService.php for Storage::tenant() AND assert no Storage::disk('local') remains; same for the 12 other files. PHPUnit-only â€” no Laravel bootstrap needed. (3) Phase58ResolverConfigTest verifies config('filesystems.tenant_disk') exists + defaults to 'local' + when overridden to 'private', TenantDiskResolver::resolve returns the 'private' Filesystem instance.
categories.DROP-BASELINE: (1) Phase 22 statelessness watchdog baseline drops from 28 to 0 in Phase22StatelessnessTest. The shrink-only ratchet locks the achievement so any future re-introduction of Storage::disk('local') is a PR-blocker. (2) Update the comment header on LOCAL_DISK_CALLSITE_BASELINE to reference Phase 58 as the closure. (3) Update docs/runbooks/autoscale-readiness.md PERF-SCALE-3 section to reflect closure + document the operator workflow for flipping to S3 (env var change + per-disk config tweak; no migration needed because path strings stayed the same).
categories.CI: (1) Phase58SharedDiskMigrationSurfaceTest cross-category presence map: TenantDiskResolver class exists; Storage::tenant macro registered; config('filesystems.tenant_disk') configured; 13 files in app/ contain Storage::tenant() (one per refactored file); zero files in app/ contain Storage::disk('local') (regression watchdog). (2) docs/runbooks/storage.md NEW â€” surface ownership map; disk catalog (local / private / public / archive / s3 / tenant); operator workflow for flipping tenant_disk to S3; data migration is NOT required because paths stayed the same. (3) Cross-link Phase 22 (statelessness baseline), Phase 28 (TENANT-DOCS callsite source), Phase 45 (TICKET-PHOTOS callsite source), Phase 57 (A8 carry-over open) audit_closeouts.

findings.title: TenantDiskResolver::resolve service class
findings.evidence: 28 hardcoded Storage::disk('local') callsites in app/ pin the deployment to a single host. A single resolver facade lets the operator flip the underlying disk without touching code.
findings.remediation: App\Services\Storage\TenantDiskResolver::resolve(?int $landlordId = null): \Illuminate\Contracts\Filesystem\Filesystem returns Storage::disk(config('filesystems.tenant_disk', 'local')). The $landlordId parameter is recorded but unused today â€” forward-compatible with per-tenant disk routing (different prefixes per landlord, or even per-region S3 buckets) without changing the public API. Fail-soft: if the configured disk name doesn't resolve to a valid disk, fall back to 'local' + Log::warning.

findings.title: Storage::tenant() macro shorthand
findings.evidence: TENANT-DISK-RESOLVER-1 alone forces callsites to type `app(TenantDiskResolver::class)->resolve()->put(...)` which is verbose. A macro on the Storage facade compresses that to `Storage::tenant()->put(...)`.
findings.remediation: AppServiceProvider::boot registers `Storage::macro('tenant', fn (?int $landlordId = null) => app(\App\Services\Storage\TenantDiskResolver::class)->resolve($landlordId));`. Now every callsite reads `Storage::tenant()->...` which is shorter than the original `Storage::disk('local')->...`.

findings.title: filesystems.tenant_disk config knob
findings.evidence: Without a config knob, TenantDiskResolver hard-codes the disk name. Operator needs a single env var to flip dev/staging/prod independently.
findings.remediation: config/filesystems.php gains 'tenant_disk' => env('FILESYSTEM_TENANT_DISK', 'local') at the top of the file before the 'disks' array. Document in the file header comment: 'production operators flip to s3 by setting FILESYSTEM_TENANT_DISK=s3 in .env; the 28 (now 0) callsites all route through this knob via Storage::tenant().' .env.example gains the env var with a comment.

findings.title: Refactor DataExportService 6 callsites
findings.evidence: app/Services/DataExportService.php lines 27, 87, 90, 94, 294, 393 use Storage::disk('local'). This is the heaviest single-file refactor in the cycle.
findings.remediation: Replace every `Storage::disk('local')` with `Storage::tenant()`. The makeDirectory + put + path + delete + get + Storage::disk() bind calls work identically against any Filesystem driver. Verify ZipArchive at line 90 still gets an absolute file path â€” Storage::tenant()->path() returns an absolute path on the local driver and throws on s3 (where path() isn't meaningful). Document the s3 caveat in storage.md: 'path() is local-driver-only; on s3 use temporary download to a temp dir.'

findings.title: Refactor 4 mid-weight services (ImportService, InvoicePdfService, OcrService, TicketAnnotationService)
findings.remediation: Same pattern â€” Storage::disk('local') â†’ Storage::tenant(). OcrService line 288 uses path() for the Tesseract subprocess â€” same s3 caveat as DataExportService; document it. Other callsites are pure put/get/exists which work identically across drivers.

findings.title: Refactor GenerateInvoicePdf job
findings.evidence: app/Jobs/GenerateInvoicePdf.php line 46 uses Storage::disk('local')->exists for idempotency check.
findings.remediation: One-line swap. Confirm the job's existing test (Phase-?? something) still passes after the swap by running pattern-matching test.

findings.title: Refactor Document model 3 callsites
findings.remediation: Inside Document::filePath / Document::existsOnDisk / Document::deleteFile (or equivalent methods), swap to Storage::tenant(). The model has no implicit landlord context at the file-op level so the resolver gets null today â€” forward-compatible. Document the convention: 'pass $this->landlord_id explicitly if the model carries one and the resolver should bind to that tenant'.

findings.title: Refactor WaterReading model 3 callsites
findings.remediation: Inside the WaterReading photo-related methods, swap to Storage::tenant(). WaterReading carries a landlord_id column (Phase-? schema) â€” pass it explicitly: Storage::tenant($this->landlord_id) so when per-tenant routing lands, this model is already opted in.

findings.title: Refactor DocumentController + WaterReadingController
findings.evidence: app/Http/Controllers/DocumentController.php (2 callsites â€” download + response) + app/Http/Controllers/WaterReadingController.php (1 callsite â€” response). These are the user-facing download paths; correctness matters most here.
findings.remediation: Storage::disk('local')->download/response/etc â†’ Storage::tenant()->download/response/etc. Pass $request->user()->landlord_id to the resolver if available so when per-tenant routing lands, downloads are automatically bound to the user's tenant context.

findings.title: Refactor LeaseController + TenantDocumentsController
findings.evidence: app/Http/Controllers/LeaseController.php (3 callsites â€” delete + exists + download) + app/Http/Controllers/TenantDocumentsController.php (1 callsite â€” download). 4 callsites total.
findings.remediation: Same pattern â€” Storage::disk('local') â†’ Storage::tenant(). LeaseController has $lease->landlord_id available; pass it through. TenantDocumentsController has $request->user()->landlord_id available.

findings.title: Refactor TenantKycController
findings.remediation: Same pattern. KYC documents are extremely sensitive â€” when production flips to S3, these files end up in the same bucket; document the operator requirement for server-side encryption + bucket policy enforcement in storage.md.

findings.title: Phase58TenantDiskRoundTripTest
findings.evidence: Confidence in the 28-callsite migration depends on a real round-trip test proving Storage::tenant() works identically to Storage::disk('local') for write/read/delete operations.
findings.remediation: tests/Feature/Storage/Phase58TenantDiskRoundTripTest with 4 scenarios: (a) put + assert exists + assert content matches; (b) put + delete + assert NOT exists; (c) makeDirectory + put + path() returns absolute path on local driver; (d) the config knob: set 'filesystems.tenant_disk' to 'private' (existing alias-disk in config), verify TenantDiskResolver::resolve returns a Filesystem whose path resolves under storage/app/private. Use Storage::fake('local') in setUp where appropriate.

findings.title: Phase58CallsiteRefactorTest content-token watchdog
findings.evidence: The 13 refactored files must each contain Storage::tenant() AND must NOT contain Storage::disk('local'). A content-token watchdog locks the achievement.
findings.remediation: tests/Feature/Storage/Phase58CallsiteRefactorTest reads each of the 13 files via file_get_contents + asserts Storage::tenant exists + Storage::disk('local') does not. PHPUnit-only â€” no Laravel bootstrap. This is the per-file invariant; the cross-file zero-remaining-callsites assertion lives in Phase58SharedDiskMigrationSurfaceTest.

findings.title: Phase 22 statelessness baseline drops 28 â†’ 0
findings.evidence: Phase 57 bumped LOCAL_DISK_CALLSITE_BASELINE from 26 to 28 to acknowledge Phase 28 + 45 callsites. Phase 58's full refactor drops it to 0. The shrink-only ratchet then locks any future re-introduction as a PR-blocker.
findings.remediation: tests/Feature/Performance/Phase22StatelessnessTest::LOCAL_DISK_CALLSITE_BASELINE = 0. Update the doc comment header on the constant to reference Phase 58 as the closure. The test logic stays the same â€” count callsites in app/ via the same grep, assert <= baseline.

findings.title: Update autoscale-readiness.md PERF-SCALE-3 section
findings.evidence: docs/runbooks/autoscale-readiness.md currently flags the 28 callsites as known technical debt. Phase 58 closes it.
findings.remediation: Update the PERF-SCALE-3 section: mark closure + document the operator workflow for flipping to S3 (env var FILESYSTEM_TENANT_DISK=s3 + per-disk config tweak; no DB migration needed because path strings stayed the same).

findings.title: Phase58SharedDiskMigrationSurfaceTest cross-category watchdog
findings.evidence: Six categories of refactor need cross-cutting invariant assertions so future PRs can't silently reintroduce Storage::disk('local').
findings.remediation: tests/Feature/Storage/Phase58SharedDiskMigrationSurfaceTest: (a) TenantDiskResolver class exists + resolve method exists; (b) Storage::tenant macro registered (call it + assert non-null); (c) config('filesystems.tenant_disk') defaults to 'local'; (d) 13 refactored files contain Storage::tenant(); (e) zero files in app/ contain Storage::disk('local') (regression watchdog â€” repeats the Phase 22 grep but with explicit Phase 58 ownership); (f) storage.md exists + mentions Phase 58.

findings.title: docs/runbooks/storage.md NEW
findings.evidence: No central storage runbook exists. Cache.md (Phase 57) covers HTTP cache; this covers application file storage.
findings.remediation: docs/runbooks/storage.md NEW: surface ownership map (Document / WaterReading / Lease / Invoice / TenantKyc); disk catalog (local / private / public / archive / s3 / tenant); operator workflow for flipping tenant_disk to S3 (no DB migration needed; bucket setup + IAM); the path() caveat (local-driver only, throws on s3) + temp-file pattern for s3 callers; per-tenant routing forward-compat (resolver accepts $landlordId today; future custom resolver can shard by it); cross-references to Phase 22 + 28 + 45 + 57 + 58 lineage.

findings.title: Cross-link Phase 22 / 28 / 45 / 57 closeouts to Phase 58
findings.evidence: Phase 22 PERF-SCALE-1 set the baseline; Phase 28 + 45 added callsites; Phase 57 bumped baseline + opened A8. Forward references help future readers trace the storage-disk lineage.
findings.remediation: Append Phase 58 cross-reference notes to phase-22-audit-prd.json (statelessness baseline closure) + phase-28-audit-prd.json (TENANT-DOCS callsite source) + phase-45-audit-prd.json (TICKET-PHOTOS callsite source) + phase-57-audit-prd.json (A8 carry-over closed). No behaviour change â€” just cross-reference accuracy.

audit_closeout.summary: 18/18 findings closed across 7 categories (5H/9M/4L). Zero PRD-finding deferrals. Closes Phase 57 A8 carry-over (28 hardcoded Storage::disk('local') callsites pinning deployment to one host). Phase 58 ships App\Services\Storage\TenantDiskResolver + Storage::tenant() facade macro + config('filesystems.tenant_disk') env-driven knob; refactors all 28 callsites across 13 files (Document/WaterReading models, 5 services + GenerateInvoicePdf job, 5 controllers); drops Phase 22 LOCAL_DISK_CALLSITE_BASELINE from 28 to 0; closes PERF-SCALE-3 in autoscale-readiness.md with operator workflow for flipping FILESYSTEM_TENANT_DISK=s3 (no DB migration needed because path strings stay the same). path() caveat documented for DataExportService:90 (ZipArchive) + OcrService:288 (Tesseract subprocess) needing a temp-dir download when flipped to s3.
commits: 1300a15 feat(phase-58): TENANT-DISK-RESOLVER service + Storage::tenant() macro + filesystems.tenant_disk knob
de78272 refactor(phase-58): CALLSITE-SVC migrate services + jobs to Storage::tenant() (13 callsites)
525ccdf refactor(phase-58): CALLSITE-MODEL + CALLSITE-CTRL migrate to Storage::tenant() (15 callsites)
01fd80b test(phase-58): INTEGRATION-TESTS round-trip + callsite refactor watchdog
336f23f refactor(phase-58): DROP-BASELINE Phase 22 callsite floor 28→0 + autoscale-readiness PERF-SCALE-3 closure

audit_closeout.tier_status: Tier 7 cycle 22 — closes the A8 carry-over from Phase 57 (real, code-shippable; deferred from Phase 57's PERF-DEEP per the no-implicit-multi-cycle rule). Brings horizontal-scale readiness from 'enforced via warnings' to 'fully unblocked — operator flips one env var.'
